title: solanum indicum subsp. adoense
intro: Solanum indicum subsp. adoense, also known as the bitter apple or wild eggplant, is a plant species belonging to the Solanaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and various skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Solanum indicum subsp. adoense include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues or as a dietary supplement.
